entities.name: Filename Format
entities.context: Naming convention for V's knowledge system documents with pattern: Type [NN] - Title v0.0.ext

entities.name: Function
entities.context: Document type in V's system, indicated by 'Function [NN]' prefix, represents operational processes

entities.name: Companion
entities.context: Document type in V's system, indicated by 'Companion [NN]' prefix, represents supporting materials

entities.name: Vrijen

relationships.context: Function is a document type within the filename format convention
Companion is a document type within the filename format convention
Companion document that defines V's voice and communication style
V uses this companion to maintain consistent voice across outputs
